'''kohamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:obconic|obconic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obconic|obconic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kohamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohamithi|kohamithi]] || [[word:kohamiji|kohamiji]] || [[word:kohamishi|kohamishi]] || [[word:kohamiki|kohamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohamuthuthu|kohamuthuthu]] || [[word:kohamujuju|kohamujuju]] || [[word:kohamushushu|kohamushushu]] || [[word:kohamukuku|kohamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohamuthu|kohamuthu]] || [[word:kohamuju|kohamuju]] || [[word:kohamushu|kohamushu]] || [[word:kohamuku|kohamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohamufthuf|kohamufthuf]] || [[word:kohamufjuf|kohamufjuf]] || [[word:kohamufshuf|kohamufshuf]] || [[word:kohamufkuf|kohamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohamethe|kohamethe]] || [[word:kohameje|kohameje]] || [[word:kohameshe|kohameshe]] || [[word:kohameke|kohameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohamothotho|kohamothotho]] || [[word:kohamojojo|kohamojojo]] || [[word:kohamoshosho|kohamoshosho]] || [[word:kohamokoko|kohamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohamotho|kohamotho]] || [[word:kohamojo|kohamojo]] || [[word:kohamosho|kohamosho]] || [[word:kohamoko|kohamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohamofthof|kohamofthof]] || [[word:kohamofjof|kohamofjof]] || [[word:kohamofshof|kohamofshof]] || [[word:kohamofkof|kohamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfthÃŸf|kohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfjÃŸf|kohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfshÃŸf|kohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfkÃŸf|kohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfthÃŸf|kohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfjÃŸf|kohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfshÃŸf|kohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfkÃŸf|kohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfthÃŸf|kohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfjÃŸf|kohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfshÃŸf|kohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohamÃŸfkÃŸf|kohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohamÃḊthÃḊ|kohamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kohamÃḊjÃḊ|kohamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kohamÃḊshÃḊ|kohamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kohamÃḊkÃḊ|kohamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohamathatha|kohamathatha]] || [[word:kohamajaja|kohamajaja]] || [[word:kohamashasha|kohamashasha]] || [[word:kohamakaka|kohamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohamatha|kohamatha]] || [[word:kohamaja|kohamaja]] || [[word:kohamasha|kohamasha]] || [[word:kohamaka|kohamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohamafthaf|kohamafthaf]] || [[word:kohamafjaf|kohamafjaf]] || [[word:kohamafshaf|kohamafshaf]] || [[word:kohamafkaf|kohamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kohamasha|kohamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohamshÃḋsha|kohamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohamrosha|kohamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohamusha|kohamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohamyasha|kohamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohamnkshÃḋsha|gokohamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohamnkrosha|gokohamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohamnkmusha|gokohamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohamnkyasha|gokohamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kohahamasha|kohahamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohahamshÃḋsha|kohahamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohahamrosha|kohahamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohahamusha|kohahamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohahamyasha|kohahamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohahamnkshÃḋsha|gokohahamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohahamnkrosha|gokohahamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohahamnkmusha|gokohahamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohahamnkyasha|gokohahamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kehÃḊmasha|kehÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kehÃḊmshÃḋsha|kehÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kehÃḊmrosha|kehÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kehÃḊmusha|kehÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kehÃḊmyasha|kehÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gokehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokehÃḊmnkrosha|gokehÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokehÃḊmnkmusha|gokehÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokehÃḊmnkyasha|gokehÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kohfamasha|kohfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohfamshÃḋsha|kohfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohfamrosha|kohfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohfamusha|kohfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohfamyasha|kohfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohfamnkshÃḋsha|gokohfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohfamnkrosha|gokohfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohfamnkmusha|gokohfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohfamnkyasha|gokohfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
